final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade, ST_XMin(omrade) AS xmin, ST_XMax(omrade) AS xmax, ST_YMin(omrade) AS ymin, ST_YMax(omrade) AS ymax
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Kristiansand%'
LIMIT 1;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [matrikkelenbygning]
SELECT objid, bygningid, kommunenummer, representasjonspunkt
FROM matrikkelenbygning_fe504ac373564e10b85865ef2a507c63.bygning
WHERE kommunenummer = '4204' AND representasjonspunkt IS NOT NULL
LIMIT 1000;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT objid, omrade FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna
WHERE ST_Intersects(omrade, ST_MakeEnvelope(62543.56990607368, 6428946.019998128, 107683.72996255726, 6493405.01999838, 25833));

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: query [flomsoner]
SELECT objid, omrade FROM flomsoner_76d14d5fe2fd4a29bfffc266fdcdd820.flomareal
WHERE gjentaksintervall = 200 AND ST_Intersects(omrade, ST_MakeEnvelope(62543.56990607368, 6428946.019998128, 107683.72996255726, 6493405.01999838, 25833));

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 5: spatial_join
-- left_source: 2
-- right_source: 3
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "representasjonspunkt"
-- right_geom: "omrade"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 6: spatial_join
-- left_source: 5
-- right_source: 4
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "representasjonspunkt"
-- right_geom: "omrade"

1.description: get Kristiansand kommunenummer and geometry bbox

3.description: get 200-year storm surge polygons limited to municipality extent

4.description: get 200-year flood polygons limited to municipality extent

5.description: find buildings intersecting storm surge polygons

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade, ST_XMin(omrade) AS xmin, ST_XMax(omrade) AS xmax, ST_YMin(omrade) AS ymin, ST_YMax(omrade) AS ymax
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Kristiansand%'
LIMIT 1;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [matrikkelenbygning]
SELECT objid, bygningid, kommunenummer, representasjonspunkt
FROM matrikkelenbygning_fe504ac373564e10b85865ef2a507c63.bygning
WHERE kommunenummer = '4204' AND representasjonspunkt IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT objid, omrade
FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna
WHERE ST_Intersects(omrade, ST_MakeEnvelope(62543.56990607368, 6428946.019998128, 107683.72996255726, 6493405.01999838, 25833));

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: query [flomsoner]
SELECT objid, omrade
FROM flomsoner_76d14d5fe2fd4a29bfffc266fdcdd820.flomareal
WHERE gjentaksintervall = 200 AND ST_Intersects(omrade, ST_MakeEnvelope(62543.56990607368, 6428946.019998128, 107683.72996255726, 6493405.01999838, 25833));

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 5: spatial_join
-- left_source: 2
-- right_source: 3
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "representasjonspunkt"
-- right_geom: "omrade"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 6: spatial_join
-- left_source: 5
-- right_source: 4
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "representasjonspunkt"
-- right_geom: "omrade"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 7: aggregate
-- source_step: 6
-- aggregation_type: "count"
-- group_by: ["bygningid"]
-- metric_as: "count"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 8: sort
-- source_step: 7
-- order_by: "bygningid"
-- order_direction: "asc"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- limit: 10
